notes: Bundibugyo virus identified by INRB; cases across 12 health zones in Ituri / Nord-Kivu / Sud-Kivu provinces. Travel notice escalated from Level 2 to Level 3 sometime after the 2026-05-16 CDC situation summary publication.

case_status: Active outbreak (imported plus local transmission); four-week border closure with DRC declared 2026-05-27
cdc_advisory: HAN-00530 (Health Alert); enhanced travel screening from 2026-05-18
who_status: Included in joint PHEIC declaration of 2026-05-17
notes: Initial cases imported from DRC (May 15-16); healthcare-worker cases in Kampala were contacts under follow-up per Uganda MoH (not undetected community transmission). 2026-05-27: Uganda ordered border with DRC closed "with immediate effect" for four weeks. Exceptions: Ebola response teams, humanitarian, cargo, security — all subject to mandatory 21-day isolation. Measure goes against WHO guidance, which warns closures push movement to unmonitored informal crossings.
